title: Twist2 Snap Frozen Skeletal Muscle IF
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5imsb","text":"This protocol details Twist2 immunofluorescent staining of fresh frozen mouse skeletal muscle.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"5dtja","text":"Collect fresh muscle according to institution-specific guidelines and snap freeze in liquid nitrogen-cooled 2-methylbutane. The Twist2 stain does not work on PFA-fixed muscle without antigen retrieval.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw slides, dry for 30 mins, surround sections with Hydrophobic Barrier Pen Vector Laboratories Catalog #H-4000 , and label
Fix with ice-cold 4 % (v/v), PFA/PBS Paraformaldehyde Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P6148 for 00:05:00
Wash three times with 1X PBS for 00:05:00
Permeabilize with 0.2 % (v/v), Triton/PBS Triton X-100 Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP151-100 for 00:10:00
Wash three times with 1X PBS for 00:05:00
Block with 5 Mass / % volume, BSA/PBS Bovine Serum Albumin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #A7030 for 01:00:00 at Room temperature
Incubate primary Anti-Twist2 antibody Abcam Catalog #ab66031 (RRID: AB_2211862) 1:500 in 1% BSA Overnight at 4 °C
Wash three times with 1X PBS for 00:05:00

Incubate secondary Alexa Fluor® 488 AffiniPure™ Goat Anti-Rabbit IgG (H L) Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #111-545-003 (RRID: AB_2338046) 1:1000 and DAPI Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher Catalog #D3571 1:1000 in 1% BSA for 02:00:00 at Room temperature
Wash three times with 1X PBS for 00:05:00
Mount with aqueous mounting media such as Fluoromount Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #F4680 . Image within 2 days.
creator: Griffen Wakelin
